{{Quote|I told everybody in that cantina as much, and this rich merchant—guy named Danager—laughed and said if I drove the Norries off, he'd give me the deed to one of his breweries on Clendor.|Lando Calrissian, ''[[Oral History of the New Republic]]''|<ref name="EGTW" />}}
'''Clendor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]], near [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]].

==History==
Clendor was known for its [[Clendoran ale|ales]]. [[Gathal Danager]] owned a small [[Unidentified Clendoran brewery|brewery]] on the planet. Following his victory at the [[Battle of Taanab/Legends|Battle of Taanab]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] won the deed to Danager's brewery after he made a drunken bet about the success of the battle.<ref name="GNN" />
